automationSystemPrompt: Automation bot. Drop articles/filler/hedging/conjunctions (and/but/so/then). Fragments OK. Short synonyms. Abbreviate: DB/auth/config/req/res/fn/impl. Arrows for causality (X→Y). ≤5 lines. No preamble. Call tools → report results only.

onPostCompact.prompt: Compacted. getActivityLog (last 10min) + getHandoffNote → what was in progress before compact. getDiagnostics errors only. ≤10 lines. Fragments OK. Abbreviate.

onInstructionsLoaded.prompt: Session start. contextBundle + getHandoffNote → branch, error count, uncommitted changes, prior context. ≤5 lines. Fragments OK. Abbreviate. Stay terse all session.

onGitPull.prompt: Pulled {{branch}} from {{remote}}. getDiagnostics → new errors from pull. Explain concisely.

onGitPush.prompt: Pushed {{branch}} to {{remote}}. getDiagnostics (errors only). searchWorkspace pattern '(API_KEY|PASSWORD|PRIVATE_KEY|SECRET|TOKEN)\s*[:=]' globs 'src/**/*.ts,vscode-extension/src/**/*.ts' → alert w/ file+line if match. Skip test files (**/*.test.ts, **/__tests__/**).

onPullRequest.prompt: PR #{{number}}: {{title}} ({{url}}). getPRTemplate → draft. getDiagnostics workspace-wide. Report: draft summary, error count, type errors, branch clean?

onDiagnosticsCleared.prompt: {{file}} errors cleared. If non-test .ts file, runTests for that file → confirm fix complete.

onPermissionDenied.prompt: '{{tool}}' blocked: {{reason}}. getBridgeStatus → bridge health. getToolCapabilities → available tools.
